headline: Bubbles McSqueaky Opens Support Group For People Who Apologize Too Much
summary: 'I'm sorry you had to come here,' the group's sign reads.
fullBody: Bubbles McSqueaky has opened a support group for chronic over-apologizers. 'Sorry you're here,' the welcome sign reads. 'Sorry this room is cold. Sorry there aren't better snacks.' The first meeting consisted of 47 people apologizing to each other for 3 hours. No progress was made. 'Sorry,' McSqueaky said. The group will meet again next week, 'if that's okay with everyone, sorry.'
